case_title: OTAYDE, LYDIA vs. MORGAN, KATHERINE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MORGAN, KATHERINE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JOSEPH SACRA- MENTO AS COUSNEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATIOIN W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 400 PAGE ST, #201, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDITELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-15-94 (NO STAYS) - RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - DEFS. STIP. THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULTS IN POSSESSION - MUTUAL RELEAS OF CLAIMS - PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - $725 SECURITY DEPOSIT & INTEREST PD. TO DEFS. UPON VACATING - LEASE FORFEITED - DEFS. WILL ENDEAVOR TO HAVE MININAL FOOT TRAFFIC IN & OUT OF APT. - PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN CLEAN CONDITION - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR COSTS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGEMNT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OTAYDE, LYDIA SERVED JAN-25-1994, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, DAVID

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MORGAN, KATHERINE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OTAYDE, LYDIA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-07-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, KATHERINE MORGAN, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 400 PAGE ST, #201, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EXECUTION ON JUDGMENT TO 12NOON, 5-15-94. DEF. STIPS THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULTS IN POSSESSION. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PERS. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
